evals.query: give me a dashboard of all my SPI fork repos
what's open across all the SPI fork repos?
are there any blocked cascades across the SPI forks?
check for human-required issues across all osdu-spi repos
what sync PRs are pending review in my fork repos?
show me the workflow status for all SPI service forks
fork health overview — any issues I should know about?
how many open PRs and issues do I have across osdu-spi-partition, entitlements, legal, and the rest?
initialize a new fork for the storage service
how is my SPI AKS cluster doing? are all pods healthy?
deploy the SPI environment with azd up
what merge requests are open across OSDU GitLab services?
check the health of my CIMPL environment
check the template-sync status — has the osdu-spi template been updated on the partition fork?
evals.note: Specific template-sync check on one repo → forks skill (status is cross-repo aggregation)

evals.query: resolve the merge conflict in fork_integration for osdu-spi-storage
evals.note: Conflict resolution is a fork lifecycle action → forks skill

evals.query: what's the CosmosDB provisioning state in my SPI environment?
evals.note: Azure PaaS resource health → health skill (not GitHub repo status)
